meaning: in order to, because of, for
quizQuestion:
彼が来る事を確かめる{___}に電話をした。
(I telephoned to make sure that he was coming.)
pedagogicalNote: ために = concrete purpose or cause; ように = goal state (used with intransitive/potential); ことにする = decide to do; ことになる = it has been decided (external); ようになる = change to be able to; 意向形と思う = I think I will; 予定 = planned; 積もりだった = had intended but didn't

meaning: in order to, because of, for
